ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user story related to the test case */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the test case */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the test case execution (e.g., SUCCESS, FAILURE) */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test case was executed */,
  "stability" INTEGER /* Stability of the test case (0 - stable, 1 - unstable) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of test execution in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test case was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the test case */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater of the test case */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the test case (1 - high, 2 - medium, 3 - low) */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of the test case (e.g., Unit, Integration, UI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user story */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user story */,
  "acceptance_criteria" TEXT /* Acceptance criteria for the user story */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user story was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user story was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the user story */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater of the user story */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the user story (1 - high, 2 - medium, 3 - low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test environment was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the test environment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater of the test environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result entry */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executed test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of execution */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test execution */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the test execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the test result */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater of the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer, manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the defect (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the defect (1 - high, 2 - medium, 3 - low) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the defect was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the defect was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the defect was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the defect */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater of the defect */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the defect was identified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test plan */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the test plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test plan */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the test plan was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test plan was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the test plan */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater of the test plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of metric collection */,
  "stability" INTEGER /* Stability rating of the test case */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of test execution in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the performance metric */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_execution_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executed test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test execution log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test execution log was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the test execution log */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater of the test execution log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_logs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_tags_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_components_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_preconditions" (
  "precondition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precondition */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "precondition_name" TEXT /* Name of the precondition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precondition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_preconditions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Number of the step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_steps_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_expected_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Description of the expected result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_expected_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_actual_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Description of the actual result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_actual_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)
